sourceOverview.notes: STT: AI + human hybrid transcription. Good for accuracy-critical use cases.

activeModelsSummary.stt:
Reverb [reverb]
Reverb Turbo / Low Cost [low_cost] — US deployment naming

audit.priceRangeSummary: Speech pricing varies by deployment/model; human transcription is priced separately from ASR.
audit.limitsSummary: Multipart uploads <2 GB. Many languages allow up to ~17h file duration; Telugu noted lower (~6h).
audit.regionSummary: US and EU deployment options exist.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Broad multilingual support; exact matrix is model/deployment dependent.
audit.freeTierSummary: No broad permanent free tier found.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Useful if you want both ASR and optional human transcription workflows in one vendor.

supplementalResearch.title: 42. Rev.ai (US) — STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 42. Rev.ai (US) — STT ✓

**Status:** Active. AI + human hybrid.

`Reverb` ($0.20/hr English), `Reverb Turbo` ($0.10/hr), `Reverb Foreign Language` ($0.30/hr, 57+ languages). Human transcription: $1.99/min. WebSocket streaming (9 languages). Free: 5 hrs credits. SOC 2, HIPAA.
